criteria_results.description: The `EditorObject` interface in `client/src/lib/types.ts` includes a new optional property `notes: string`.
criteria_results.evidence: The file `client/src/lib/types.ts` shows that `notes?: string;` has been added to the `EditorObject` type.

criteria_results.description: A new file `client/src/components/editor/PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx` exists and exports a React component.
criteria_results.evidence: The file `client/src/components/editor/PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx` exists and exports a React functional component named `PMObjectDetailsPanel`.

criteria_results.description: The `Rnd` component within `ObjectRenderer.tsx` has its `disableDragging` prop set based on a new prop passed into the `ObjectRenderer` component.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx`, the `Rnd` component's `disableDragging` prop is set to `disableMovement || isTech || layer.locked || tool !== 'select' || isRotating`, where `disableMovement` is a new prop passed to `ObjectRenderer`.

criteria_results.description: `MobileBottomBar.tsx` imports and renders `PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx` when an object is selected and the user is a mobile PM.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx`, the `PMObjectDetailsPanel` is rendered inside a `DrawerContent` component that is conditionally shown when `pmMobileDrawer` is true. `pmMobileDrawer` is defined as `isPM && isMobile && selectedObject`, which matches the criteria.

criteria_results.description: The main reducer in `editor-context.tsx` contains a case to handle an action that updates the `notes` field of an object.
criteria_results.evidence: The `editorReducer` in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx` has an `UPDATE_OBJECT` action type. The `PMObjectDetailsPanel` component dispatches this action with a payload containing the `notes` update, which is a valid way to update the object's notes.

commit_message.subject: feat(editor): Add mobile view for Project Managers
commit_message.body:
Implement a read-only mobile view for Project Managers (PMs).

This view allows PMs on mobile devices to inspect objects on the
blueprint without the ability to move them. When an object is selected,
a details panel appears, allowing the PM to:
- View and edit the object's label.
- Add and view notes specific to the object.
- Manage photos associated with the object.

Key changes include:
- Added a `notes` field to the `EditorObject` type.
- Introduced a `disableMovement` prop in `ObjectRenderer` to make
  objects non-draggable.
- Created a new `PMObjectDetailsPanel` component for the mobile-specific
  UI.
- Updated the `MobileBottomBar` to conditionally render the new panel
  for PMs on mobile devices.
